title: Approval Queue
description: Build an approval queue. Employees submit requests (title, description, amount). The request starts as 'pending'. A logged-in approver can update the status to 'approved' or 'rejected' (this requires auth). Need: POST /api/requests (public submit), GET /api/requests (list all), GET /api/requests/pending (filtered list), PUT /api/requests/:id (update, auth required).
skeleton:
build for web and javascript backend

create a Requests table:
  title, required
  amount (number), default 0
  status, default 'pending'

allow signup and login

# Your endpoints and page here — build a public submit form + an approval queue view
